steps.action: Scroll to Background AI Features section
steps.observed: Auto-Naming section visible with toggle, First Trigger (chunks) input, and Repeat Interval (chunks) input

evidence.details: Background AI Features section shows Auto-Naming with: enable/disable toggle (aria-pressed), First Trigger (chunks) spinbutton defaulting to 5, Repeat Interval (chunks) spinbutton defaulting to 10. When toggle is off, the spinbutton inputs are hidden.

steps.action: Scroll to Background AI Features section
steps.observed: Auto-Summarization section visible with toggle, Summarization Interval (seconds) input, and Max Transcript Length (chars) input

evidence.details: Auto-Summarization section shows: enable/disable toggle (aria-pressed), Summarization Interval (seconds) spinbutton defaulting to 300, Max Transcript Length (chars) spinbutton defaulting to 50000. When toggle is off, the spinbutton inputs are hidden.

steps.action: Toggle auto-naming OFF via JS click
Change summarization interval to 120 via fill command

steps.observed: Auto-Naming toggle still OFF, Summarization Interval still 120, Max Transcript Length still 50000

VAL-CFG-004.title: Settings sent to backend in session config

steps.observed: DEFAULT_CONFIG includes: auto_naming_enabled:true, auto_naming_first_trigger:5, auto_naming_repeat_interval:10, auto_summarization_enabled:true, auto_summarization_interval:300, auto_summarization_max_transcript_length:50000

steps.action: Check session_start message in frontend/src/app/AppLayout.tsx line 57
steps.expected: Sends full config including auto_naming and auto_summarization fields
steps.observed: handleSessionStart sends { type: 'session_start', name: state.sessionName, config: state.config } — state.config is the full SessionConfig including all auto_naming_* and auto_summarization_* fields

steps.expected: SessionConfig interface has auto_naming and auto_summarization fields
steps.observed: SessionConfig has: auto_naming_enabled:boolean, auto_naming_first_trigger:number, auto_naming_repeat_interval:number, auto_summarization_enabled:boolean, auto_summarization_interval:number, auto_summarization_max_transcript_length:number

Backend SessionConfig Pydantic model has: auto_naming_enabled:bool=True, auto_naming_first_trigger:int=5, auto_naming_repeat_interval:int=10, auto_summarization_enabled:bool=True, auto_summarization_interval:int=300, auto_summarization_max_transcript_length:int=50000

evidence.details: Verified via code inspection: (1) SessionConfig TypeScript interface includes all 6 auto_naming/auto_summarization fields, (2) DEFAULT_CONFIG sets sensible defaults, (3) AppLayout.handleSessionStart sends the full config object in session_start WS message, (4) Backend Pydantic SessionConfig model accepts all 6 fields with matching defaults.

frictions.description: Clicking toggle buttons via agent-browser refs sometimes triggers navigation to active session page instead of toggling the button. The scrollable content area (.overflow-y-auto) doesn't respond to agent-browser scroll command — needed JavaScript scrollTop instead.
frictions.resolution: Used JavaScript document.querySelector('.overflow-y-auto').scrollTop to scroll, and JS click on the correct aria-pressed button for toggling. Used agent-browser fill command for number inputs.

summary: Tested 4 assertions: all 4 passed. Settings page correctly shows Auto-Naming controls (toggle, first trigger, repeat interval) and Auto-Summarization controls (toggle, interval, max transcript length). Settings persist to localStorage and survive page refresh. Code inspection confirms session_start WS message sends full config including all auto_naming/auto_summarization fields, and backend accepts them.
